title: Cannot sign in
symptoms: Invalid login or agency not found
fixes: Confirm agency slug exactly matches what is shown in Control (case-insensitive).
Platform owner accounts sign in without an agency slug from the owner portal.
If you see 'agency suspended', add billing in Control → Billing.

title: Handset shows unauthorized
symptoms: Voice or channels fail with unauthorized error
fixes: Verify the radio key on the device matches Control → Agency settings.
After a key rotation, update every handset with the new key.
Confirm the agency is not disabled.

title: No audio
fixes: Grant microphone permission to safeT Mobile.
Check the unit is assigned to the channel and has talk permission.
On the console, confirm the channel is not held by another priority talker.

title: AI dispatch will not enable
symptoms: Toggle fails or channel stays off
fixes: AI dispatch requires the Pro plan. Upgrade in Billing.
Only agency admins can enable AI dispatch per channel.
